perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: OPERATION SOTERIA SHIELD: 2 month FBI op with 91 federal + state and local Texas partners - 276 subjects arrested and 89 children rescued. stories.headline: Elderly woman's shock at current gas prices highlights dollar devaluation since Fed creation.
stories.body:
Older American is asked how much she thinks it cost to fill up your gas tank

She guesses $20

Her mind is literally blown when she’s told how much the cost is today

- Since the Federal Reserve was created the US dollar has lost 98% of its value
- A dozen eggs that cost $1.00 in 1970 now average over $4.00–$6.00+
- The average new car in 1975 cost around $4,500. Today the average new car costs over $48,000
- A first-class postage stamp cost 15 cents in 1980. Today it costs 73 cents
- The median US home price in 1970 was about $23,000. Today it’s over $420,000 nationally (around $800,000 in California)
- A gallon of milk that cost roughly $1.10 in the early 1980s now costs $3.80–$4.50 on average

Our quality of life has been absolutely destroyed by the devaluing of our money

End the Fed

stories.headline: Joe Rogan debates Harland Williams on US involvement with Iran
stories.body:
New: Joe Rogan gets in serious debate with Harland Williams over why the US should not be at war with Iran:

ROGAN: “I don’t like this Iran war thing.”

WILLIAMS: “You don’t like the idea of preventing Iran from having a nuclear weapon? That’s a pretty good concept.”

ROGAN: “I don’t want Afghanistan 2.0 where we end up being stuck there for 20 years and milk American taxpayers in the process.”

WILLIAMS: “We’re preventing a rebel country from getting a bomb that can destroy parts of our planet. I think it’s worth it.”

ROGAN: “In theory yes, but the truth is Iran was not close or even capable of having a nuclear weapon.”

WILLIAMS: “They were pursuing it though.”

ROGAN: “This is Israel’s war. I get why they want this conflict, but I don’t know if it’s a good thing for America.”

stories.headline: Japanese chicken cabbage hot pot recipe shared
stories.body:
マンジャロいらねえほど痩せられる鍋

「鶏むねキャベツ鍋」

がマジで旨すぎヘルシーなので絶対試して

キャベツ半玉500g、水700cc、酒50cc、鶏ガラ大1半、鰹節2g、塩小1/3煮る

鶏胸肉350gを削ぎ切りし塩2つまみ、薄力粉大さじ2をはたき煮てオリーブオイル、胡椒

痩せたいならキャベツ鍋食いな？

stories.headline: FBI LA highlights May arrests including former SoCal mayor
stories.body: Patrick Grandy, Assistant Director in Charge of FBI Los Angeles, spotlights investigative successes for the month of May. Highlights include the arrest of a man for alleged assault in furtherance of a hate crime, the indictment of a former Southern California Mayor for allegedly acting as an illegal agent for the Chinese government.
